title: ジャパンカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This is it! Right from the start, this was my dream stage! My gateway to the world!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The Japan Cup! Hola, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Is that El Condor Pasa?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
What's she doing in the stands?! Did she come
here to see us?! That's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa always has her mind on the fans.
She walks among them giving out high-fives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head to the course, responding to the cheers
from both sides all the while.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now that we're standing here, I finally get it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know why I couldn't come here in my classic
year.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was missing so much. Skills, confidence, and the
drive to entertain everyone!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But things are different now!
choice_data_list: There's no way you can lose!
There's no way you can lose!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno. That's exactly right. I belong on this stage
now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm one year behind on my dream... but I'll use
that time to make this win a million times more
heroic!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
El, today's race is just like the Derby—2,400
meters at Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But this time, I... I...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, no matter what, I'm sure it's gonna be
amazing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We're both so much stronger now! And look at all
our adoring fans!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I did my very best back at the
Derby...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I want today to be even better! I wanna beat
you and become the best in Japan!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Right back at you! I'm so excited to race against
the new, stronger you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This isn't just a race—it's a match between you and me! You are my Japan Cup!
